summary.art: April 3, 2026: Global art market shows 4% growth, with Korea emerging as a key hub. Recent domestic records at Seoul Auction include Yoshitomo Nara's "Nothing about it" (KRW 15B) and Yayoi Kusama's "Pumpkin (MBOK)" (KRW 10.45B). The "20!2026 Art Seoul" exhibition continues until April 13.
summary.market: April 3, 2026: Markets remain closed for Good Friday. Investors are observing the trend of stability following recent recovery reports.
